data.content: Implementation review: APPROVED. The fix on branch worktree-foolery-bcc2-dialog-width correctly addresses the root cause. DialogContent base class includes sm:max-w-lg (512px) which overrode the unprefixed max-w-[1600px]. The fix adds sm:max-w-[1600px] to explicitly win the specificity fight at the sm: breakpoint. Test asserts the sm: override is present. No security issues, no regressions. Single commit b8a2cad1 ready for merge to main.
